items.title: Oil nears $110 a barrel after gas field strike
items.dek: Iran's military warned it would take "decisive action" in response to the strike on its energy infrastructure.
items.body: Iran's military warned it would take "decisive action" in response to the strike on its energy infrastructure.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran's intelligence minister Esmail Khatib killed in air strike
items.dek: Israel said it had killed Khatib, whose death was confirmed by Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Wednesday.
items.body: Israel said it had killed Khatib, whose death was confirmed by Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Wednesday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian archaeologist can be sent to Ukraine for trial, Polish judge rules
items.dek: Archaeologist Alexander Butyagin is accused of conducting illegal excavations in Crimea - Ukraine's peninsula annexed by Russia.
items.body: Archaeologist Alexander Butyagin is accused of conducting illegal excavations in Crimea - Ukraine's peninsula annexed by Russia.
items.author: IriLine Desk
